author: SantiMod
content:
The Atlas Brew #32 - Pre-426LIVE  is confirmed. Join us on Wednesday at 19:00 UTC!  

This week’s topic is 426LIVE!  

The Atlas Brew is a WEEKLY Star Atlas Community Event based around having fun, speculating about the future and much more. 

See you all on today at 19:00 UTC in the Voice Channel! Join 10 minutes earlier to participate in the Quiz! Winner gets one ship!

Nothing discussed in The Atlas Brew is guaranteed to make it to game and the event is purely for entertainment purposes.

https://discord.com/events/789226204980707409/1024374169498034216
